description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, slender barrel. The stock is made from a medium-brown wood, extending from the butt to the fore-end, and features a smooth, slightly curved shoulder rest. The barrel and receiver are constructed from dark metal, with visible iron sights mounted along the top. The trigger guard and bolt handle are also metallic, and the rifle appears to have an internal magazine, as there is no visible detachable magazine. The overall design is reminiscent of early to mid-20th century military rifles, with a utilitarian and robust appearance suitable for both urban and rural environments.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and long dark metal barrel, featuring iron sights and a traditional design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, metal barrel, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the slim profile of the barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock and metal components, similar to view 0 but from the other side.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the stock and barrel, with the trigger guard and bolt handle partially visible.
